commit_scope: Expose promoted BML read routes through the public kernel-router front door.

observations: After the Rust template matcher fix was deployed, public probes still showed missing X-Form-Router for the promoted endpoints; /api/utils/kernel_status remained native.
The BML front-door service Traefik labels did not expose GET /api/runtime/events or the single-segment template paths for views stats, reaction summary, reaction threads, and concept voices.
The overlay now adds bounded GET Path/PathRegexp rules for those promoted read routes at priority 1182.

The Hostinger deploy canary and public deploy verifier now probe the promoted read routes for native-kernel router proof. Post-deploy production evidence showed these BML promoted read handlers expose X-Form-Router but not per-handler proof headers.

phase_gate.reason: Local ingress proof passed; CI, merge, deploy, and public promoted-route header verification remain for this branch.

evidence_refs: public curl header probes after af2eceeb deploy

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Promoted BML read routes are reachable through the public kernel-router front door and return native proof headers instead of falling through to Python.
test_flows: After deploy, request promoted endpoints with Accept: application/json and verify X-Form-Router is native-kernel.
Run ./scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh against the public API and web surfaces.
Confirm Hostinger deploy canary probes the promoted read routes inside kernel-router-bml-front-door before public verification.
